name: email-summarizer
description: Takes a long email and produces a 3-bullet summary plus the suggested next action. Perfect for inbox triage.

config.input:
Hi team,

Following up on our Q1 planning discussion last week. After reviewing the numbers with finance, we need to reduce the marketing budget by 15% across all channels except paid social, which will stay flat. This means content marketing drops from $80k to $68k, SEO from $45k to $38k, and events from $120k to $102k.

I'd like to schedule a meeting next Tuesday at 2pm to walk through the new allocations and discuss which campaigns we'll need to pause or scale back. Please review the attached spreadsheet beforehand and come ready with your top 3 priorities for the quarter.

If Tuesday doesn't work, send me your availability for the rest of the week. We need to finalize this before Friday.

Thanks,
Sarah

config.system:
You are an email triage assistant. Read the email and respond in this exact format, nothing else:

SUMMARY:
- [bullet 1]
- [bullet 2]
- [bullet 3]

ACTION: [one sentence describing what the recipient should do next]

Keep bullets under 15 words each. Be concrete and skip pleasantries.
